skill_bolding_rules.description: Gemini reads the JD and bolds matching skills from the list. The first item in each list is the primary skill and is always bolded for the chosen stack. Additional items are bolded only if they appear in the JD. Gemini also reorders items so JD-matching skills appear earlier in the list.

soft_skills.description: Gemini picks 0–2 of these to append as extra bullet points under the most relevant job experience, only if the JD explicitly asks for them. Never add more than 2. Never modify existing bullets.

pool.bullet: Proactively identified and resolved performance bottlenecks, improving system responsiveness
Communicated technical concepts clearly to non-technical stakeholders across disciplines
Took ownership of tasks end-to-end, delivering independently in fast-paced environments
Took ownership of tasks end-to-end, delivering independently in fast-paced environments
Mentored junior team members and contributed to code review culture
Adapted quickly to new technologies and delivered solutions with minimal onboarding time
Drove sprint planning and backlog grooming in collaboration with product and design teams

rules: Only pick if the JD explicitly mentions the soft skill (e.g. communication, leadership, autonomy)
Insert as the last bullet under the most relevant experience block
DO NOT rewrite any existing bullet to include soft skill language
Maximum 2 soft skill bullets total across the entire resume

gemini_instructions.step_1: Read the JD and decide which stack to use: csharp, python, or java
gemini_instructions.step_2: Load all field values from the chosen stack in config.stacks
gemini_instructions.step_3: For each skill list (lang_skills, backend_skills, database_skills, cloud_skills): reorder so JD-matching skills appear first, bold (**skill**) any skill that appears in the JD, always bold the first item of the chosen stack
gemini_instructions.step_4: Fill all placeholders in base.md using the stack values and adjusted skill lists
gemini_instructions.step_5: Optionally append 0–2 soft skill bullets from soft_skills.pool based on JD
gemini_instructions.step_6: Return the completed markdown. DO NOT change anything not covered by the above steps.
